summary: Iteration 6 testing completed successfully. All new attendance features verified: 3 status buttons (Aanwezig/Afwezig/Ziek) per student, expandable row with reason/educator note fields, add-student dialog for walk-ins, Meldingen page with sick/absent distinction, Dashboard absence feed working.

minor.issue: Old attendance records have status=null (legacy). Frontend handles this correctly by deriving status from isPresent boolean.

passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/attendance with status='sick', absenceReason='Koorts', educatorNote='Test' - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/attendance with status='absent' and absenceReason - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/attendance with status='present' - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/attendance/add-student creates registration + attendance for walk-in - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/attendance/add-student rejects duplicate student - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/attendance/by-date/2026-03-10 returns students with status field (or derives from isPresent) - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/notifications/absence-feed returns items with status, absenceReason, educatorNote - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/students/search returns matching students for autocomplete - PASSED
FRONTEND: Attendance page at /aanwezigheden shows 3 status buttons (Aanwezig/Afwezig/Ziek) per student - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Attendance page has search input at top - VERIFIED (data-testid='attendance-search-input')
FRONTEND: Attendance page has 'Toevoegen' button per study moment to add walk-in students - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Expand chevron button on student row works - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Expanded row shows 'Reden afwezigheid' input when absent and 'Opmerking ziekte' when sick - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Expanded row shows 'Bericht naar leerkracht' (educator note) input - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Expanded row has 'Opslaan' button - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Registration notes (from teacher) visible with MessageSquare icon - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Add student dialog has student name input with autocomplete - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Add student dialog has class select and note field - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: /meldingen page shows sick vs absent distinction - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Meldingen page shows Thermometer icon for sick, XCircle icon for absent - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Meldingen page shows 'was ziek' and 'was afwezig' text - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Meldingen page has filter tabs (Alles/Ongelezen) - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows absence feed with sick/absent distinction - VERIFIED
FRONTEND: Dashboard feed shows unread count and mark-as-read functionality - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Old attendance records without status field are handled correctly - frontend derives status from isPresent boolean (line 27 in Attendance.js)
The ExpandedFields component correctly shows different labels based on status: 'Opmerking ziekte' for sick, 'Reden afwezigheid' for absent
Educator notes display in Dashboard feed uses text-blue-500 class as specified

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features verified working via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_WalkIn_Student and TEST_Duplicate_Student via add-student endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 new attendance features fully tested. Key features: (1) 3 status buttons per student (Aanwezig green, Afwezig red, Ziek amber). (2) Expandable row shows reason field (only for absent/sick) and educator note field. (3) Add-student dialog for walk-ins with autocomplete. (4) Meldingen page shows sick (Thermometer icon, amber) vs absent (XCircle icon, gray). (5) Dashboard feed shows educator notes in blue. (6) Old attendance records without status field work correctly - frontend derives status from isPresent.

mocked_apis.Email sending: Email functionality is MOCKED (non-functional) as documented

key_verification_notes.status_buttons: 3 buttons per student: Aanwezig (emerald/green), Afwezig (rose/red), Ziek (amber)
key_verification_notes.expanded_fields: Reason field label changes: 'Opmerking ziekte' for sick, 'Reden afwezigheid' for absent. Educator note always shown.
key_verification_notes.add_student_dialog: Dialog at Toevoegen button with student name autocomplete, class select, optional note
key_verification_notes.meldingen_page: Shows Thermometer icon + 'was ziek' for sick, XCircle icon + 'was afwezig' for absent
key_verification_notes.dashboard_feed: Shows educator notes in blue (text-blue-500) when present
key_verification_notes.legacy_records: Old attendance records with status=null handled by deriving from isPresent boolean
